note: Direction construction is DECODE evidence; activation addition gives a handle, not a complete mechanism.
Report detection should rise with dose rather than appear only at one cherry-picked scale.
Zero-dose, random, shuffled, and wrong-concept controls are the false-report floor.
The report-before-output check is the main guard against the model merely describing visible continuation style.
Voice/source attribution asks whether the model tracks default, prompt, user, and activation causes rather than visible style only.
